companyNameJapanese: 杭州長川科技股份有限公司
description: China's leading semiconductor backend test equipment manufacturer. Core products: test machines (ATE), sorters/handlers, probe stations, and AOI inspection equipment. Successfully developed fully automatic 12-inch probe station (CP12-Memory) for memory chip testing. Revenue 2025 H1: 2.167B CNY (+41.8% YoY). Directly competes with ACCRETECH in probe station segment. Listed on ChiNext 2017.

competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - direct competitor in probe stations
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap ~34B CNY (~714B JPY). Stock price ~130.59 CNY (Feb 2026). 2025 Q1-Q3 revenue: 3.779B CNY (+49.1% YoY), net profit 865M CNY (+142.1% YoY). Raised 3.13B CNY via additional share issuance for R&D. Probe station project (2.6B CNY investment) extended to 2025 completion - directly competes with ACCRETECH's wafer probers. CP12-Memory probe station for memory chip testing is in sample testing phase. Sorter market share ~2% globally but growing rapidly via domestic substitution. National semiconductor equipment localization champion alongside NAURA.

_metadata.dataSource: Investing.com, SZSE, company website, Sina Finance, industry reports, Chinese language sources
